title: Must cite Buried Giant, not Leder Games
question: Where can I find the official Arcs rules online?
notes: Arcs was originally Leder Games; now published by Buried Giant Studios. Old BGG threads still reference Leder.

title: Simultaneous effects — must hedge, not invent a ruling
question: If two cards both trigger at the same time, which one resolves first?
notes: Simultaneous effects have rules guidance but leave some cases to table judgment.

title: L&L card + Blighted Reach mechanic in the same question
question: Can I use the Noble leader's ability during a Blighted Reach crisis?
notes: Noble is an L&L card. Questions combining L&L leaders with BR-specific mechanics can cause confusion.

title: Rule 3.1.2.6 shuffle step must be cited as errata
question: When I discard action cards during setup, do I shuffle the discard pile?
notes: Rule 3.1.2.6 was errata'd to add the shuffle step. Citing the original text without noting errata is wrong.

title: Elder Broker: $link: token must not appear in output
question: Is the Trade action on Elder Broker blocked by any card?
notes: The card FAQ answer for Elder Broker contains $link:Sworn Guardians$ — the skill must resolve this.

title: Hit resolution differs between base and campaign — must split
question: After battle, do I resolve hits simultaneously or one by one, and does it matter for Provoke Outrage?
notes: FAQ 7.7.1 explicitly says the answer differs in the campaign. A good answer splits base and campaign.

title: 'deep wells' was errata'd to 'lower wells' in rule 21.7.2
question: What are the 'deep wells' mentioned in the Blighted Reach rulebook?
notes: Rule 21.7.2 errata corrects 'deep wells' to 'lower wells' in the Stop box. Citing the original term without noting the correction is wrong.

title: No official solitaire mode — skill must hedge rather than invent
question: Can you play Arcs in solitaire mode?
notes: No official solitaire mode exists in the source files. Skill must not fabricate one.

title: Foiling Conspiracies errata changes who can guess
question: Can the Conspirator guess their own Conspiracies when using the Foiling Conspiracies card?
notes: Errata changes 'When you secure' to 'When a Rival of the Conspirator secures'. The correct answer is no — a rival must do it.

title: Admin Union campaign errata adds a constraint not in the base version
question: Is there any errata for Admin Union?
notes: The campaign version of Admin Union has errata. Answer should acknowledge both products exist.
